Vehement Sword of Reivaj  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 42
DMG: 27 Dmg Bonus: 146
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +6 INT: +6
Effect: Rampage (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
Nice sword .............When it Proc's
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2003 at 2:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258782910
1 post
i was lucky enough to be given one of these buy a guildy (many thanks)and have found it to be very good in combat even if i did get it at lvl 37ish and now at 41 still finding it great fun to use but unfortunaly not lucky enough to have it proc for me :(,but with 225str as a troll with all avalible str spells on im hitting for around 130 max on one hit ! least to say you can hit for something in the region of 200hps with double att and thats without slam dam fine weapon and will be better when it proc's
▲ Page top
not a bad weapon
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2003 at 7:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788756993
26 posts
Not saying this weapon is good , but im a 55 war with 167 DEX and it procs a lot for me especially when i got Boon of Garou, but i usually just use this weapon to practice 2h slashing, but its pretty good when it procs a bunch of times especially when it absorbs the blows. Just saying if it keeps procing and think at lvl 65 when maybe you have even maxed DEX you would be invincible with this weapon.

Edited, Thu Jul 17 20:40:37 2003
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2003 at 1:48 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788720612
1 post
I dont think this would be much help to you guys, but somehow i managed to get the sword for only 50pp .. didn't have to bargain at all. And then i see you guys goin off about selling it for 18k..that just seems outrageous. Oh well.
▲ Page top
High Dex is the key
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2002 at 12:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249668944
1 post
Just got this tonight in the castle in Kael. Procs multiple times per fight with a dex of 140. Only proced once per fight with dex of 100. Lasts about 10 minutes if not taking damage. Takes a bunch of hits off the light blues in Kael but only a few hits off the dark blues, before getting used up. Was pretty useful overall. Nice damage, very fast with haste. Strength of Earth and Storm Strength overwrite it, but not Strength of the Kunzar (cobalt boots). Only experienced about a 19 AGI drop and about 38 STR bonus.

Dalinor Evenstar, Solusek Ro, 49 Human Warrior

proc
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2002 at 2:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255364330
1 post
Yall have all this great info on what it does and where it drops, just one thing. WHEN THE HECK DOES IT PROC ! !

# Sep 28 2002 at 1:14 PM Rating: Excellent

Buddy's SK had it start to proc at 45.
▲ Page top
Good Buy?
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 11:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252776164
View User Forum
9 posts
Jus boought this sword off a player trader in bazaar for 1k pp, wonder if it is a good buy. for my 48 sk, the proc raise my str to 165 with syphon str. However, the damage output seems to be maximum of 90 only. BTW, for the stats, i think 1 kpp is a real deal. What say you ??


Edited, Mon Sep 9 11:52:04 2002

RE: Good Buy?
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2003 at 4:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256208576
1 post
Don't wanna burst your bubble but peeps on Inny server are selling this thing on average for 500 plat. Nice deal at that amount.

Edited, Fri Feb 28 16:14:02 2003
▲ Page top
This sword
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 12:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781960745
View User Forum
15 posts
This sword is very useful when used as the MA or even SA. It can save a lot of healing on the clerics part if it procs often enough.

The problem is, when fighting tough mobs, only one hit will take away the proc, and bye bye str boost.

Also, with a str boost from shammy, I know the rampage doesn't stick. Kinda silly, the damage absorbtion should still work IMHO. For all you SK's, it DOES stack with Siphon Str. Just ask the buffer in group not to str boost you.

The damage is generally good, I've hit in the 130 range with it with str about 190.

Oh yeah, another silly thing, you can still be stunned while immune to damage. :P

All in all I really like this sword and use it quite often. I switch between this, Throneblade of Ykesha, and Abram's Axe of the Stoic, depending on my roll in the group. I only use Abram's when I need the extra resists.

Hope the info helps those that are after this weapon.
▲ Page top
Yup it procs like crazy
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2002 at 9:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570536142
33 posts
Well I have a dex of 84 and let me tell you it is very common for it to proc at least 2-3 times per fight.
While the shield is up Im merrily Lifetaping for 75pts :)

very worth it.
▲ Page top
RE: Yup it procs like crazy
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2002 at 10:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253493687
52 posts
I can see this weapon being very useful to an SK. The -20 agi on the proc actually is meaningless because for the moment you won't be taking any damage.

As a rogue I picked up a shadow rager with a similar proc. The effect is nice but I am definitely gonna trade it for a blood point. But for an SK, the momentary relief from damage is enough time to cast all sorts of spells.

So I think absorb damage procs are more useful than lifetap procs for hybrids since SKs can already lifetap, and for more. Simply using this weapon would be great for soloing, since it would give the opportunity to cast your spells and would save you some life.

Yes, I know you can still be stunned with magic skin on but if you don't like that play an ogre.

Darkdirk Devertebrater, 55 rogue
Penumbro Deathblow, 20 SK
Teque No, 21 bard
▲ Page top
Does Rampage stack
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 8:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758699625
11 posts
Does Rampage stack with the bard damage absorbtion song? Would be interesting if it did... 50dd absorbed when song is playing then Rampage procs and dependent on level more DD absorbtion. Hmmmm......

Runtiss Abigone
Level 46 Paladin
Drinal Server
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 29 2002 at 9:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I want to buy one of these on Brell. Send tells to Islude or Solmyr Thanks.
Rampage
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2002 at 2:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758388216
Scholar
82 posts
Got one of these in Riff House today.

[Effect: Rampage] The proc is interesting. First off you get a "Your spell would not take hold" message if you have another strength buff up (such as that from druid or shaman).

The proc seems to last about as long as the damage absorption, which for a level 40+ means mere seconds at best. But even so, with a high dexterity I could see this thing saving hundreds, even 1000+ hp in a fight. Potentially great for duels.

The -20 hit to agility means a reduction in AC of about 6-8. Not the direction we tanks like to see our AC move, but since you're not taking damage during that time it's really no big deal.

Edited, Sat Apr 20 03:08:50 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 10 2002 at 6:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OMG! i had someone willing to trade this to me for 100pp and a runic carver in ec on druzzil ro but he went ld before we finished the trade.. ......... oh man! now i really really really really want this sword for my pally!
Nice wep
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2002 at 3:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759934636
3 posts
I was wondering if I got a good or bad deal on this when I bought it. Seems like it fell on the good side at 1.5K. I was finally able to break the 100+ hit with this. I know it's not the best out there, but it's better than I've had before.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 15 2002 at 4:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i am on Terris Thule looking for one of these i have an Abram's Axe of the Stoic for trade send a tell to Twiztid or tethya if interested
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 11 2001 at 11:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey ya'll, I got one of these suckers for sale on Terris-Thule server. 7k or good rogue trade. Send a tell to Jenx.
Vehement Report
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 3:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251513065
2 posts
I am not sure if I like this wep or not, I'm a DE WAR and its' proc boosts me to 189 str but the damage it does is rarely over 105. Crits don't seem to be coming any more often, and the 80pt damage soaker or whatever it is seems sort of insignificant. My dex is only 84 though so maybe I'll look to trade some of my str gear for equivilent ac dex gear...Definately worth 5k or so on Zeb.
▲ Page top
this sword tries to proc alot
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2001 at 4:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761259510
43 posts
My poor lil pally lvl 42 with dex 86 gets at least four attempts at a proc for this sword if not more. Usually gets a your will is insufficient to command this weapon on the first swing. I was in Lguk fighting in assassin supplier room and tanking assassin...so i decided to count procs...got 1 right off the bat...and got more too...lost count over 10...had to run to save chanter and cleric from supplier pop...ended up dying when a runner pulled the wiz's off the ledge. But i know this thing procs like a noob begging for plat...LOL
▲ Page top
RE: this sword tries to proc alot
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2002 at 6:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
The insufficient will is when your not high enough lvl. How do you get this at the beigning of a fight, then a few procs unless you ding 45 in the middle of a fight alot?
▲ Page top
good anywhere
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2001 at 1:05 PM Rating: Decent
Drakang
View User Forum
Scholar
252 posts
I got this sword on a guild raid and thought its okay but not anything great. Then I went to Guk to camp for a ghoulbane for my SK epic. Even with dex only in the 90's it procs enough that only the shin lord could hurt me. Finished nearly every other fight with more hps than I started thanks to lifetap spells (easy to cast when protected). Then I went on a guild raid to Fear. Every once in a while I would cast to close together and get aggro. Usually only got hit twice before aggro was back on Main tank. Rune usually held up through both hits. Means the druid in my group never had to heal me. I still carry other weapons for different occasions but this one gets pulled out alot.

Drakang Vondraconis
48th season Shadow Knight
of the Bloodhorde
____________________________
The Power of Hate conquers all foes.
Leader of The Silent Minority a Rathe Guild
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 07 2001 at 1:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i am selling this sword on torvonnilous for 10k or if anyone has a lammy and would like to trade plz send moorman or heon a tell i would keep but not 45 and my 2hs is not the best
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 04 2001 at 11:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im selling one of these on Veeshan. give Bandaten or Elventine a tell.
Nice Sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2001 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got one of these for my slightly twinked Dark Elf SK who is currently fighting in Highkeep beating down on the Goblins (Tunare Server). Being a Dark Elf, his strength is a weak 117 with this sword equipped. However he does hit in the high 50s and 60s with his best double attack being 73,72. The delay is a bit long, BUT pair this up with an FBSS and even the level 16 enchanter haste spell....this sucker becomes 27dmg 28dly and he totally beats down anything in his way. Heck, he soloed the Lookout Room at level 22 while waiting for a spot to open in the Guard Room hehe. This sword is awesome at this low level, and can't wait to see how it performs when he gets higher and it procs combined with the FBSS and higher level enchanter haste. =)
▲ Page top
Quest
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 11:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755938326
3 posts
Yes, you can waste the fang by turning it in and getting the belt. If you turn it into Reijav the Battle?(or Storm)rager, you will get the sword. I haven't heard this, I have done many times. He is in the Frostgiant hall, second entrance, back room. Same guy that drops the sword.
▲ Page top
RE: Quest
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 11:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361228121
58 posts
The Blizzent Fang Quest will get you a Dragonhide Belt, not this sword
▲ Page top
Quest
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2001 at 12:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755938326
3 posts
You can turn in Blizzent's fang to Reijav in Kael, and you will get the sword. I have done it many times and sold the sword, for nowhere near 18000p. It's tuff to sell them for 4k anymore :( Good hunting, Blizzant can be a bit hard to find
▲ Page top
Value?
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 10:11 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am a 45 warrior and i recently got this item during a Kael raid. I definately taunt better and do more damge with dual wield using a wurmslayer. The shield effect on this is cool, but if i can't taunt the MOB of a ranger or rogue, then it is worthless.

I ask this: Should I keep this weapon or sell.

Selling it would get me some armor I have been after and raise my AC. And also anyone know a reasonable price for this? I know it says 18k but that seems over the top considering it wasn't that difficult to get and Kael raids are pretty common, at least on MM.
